result:
**Operational Summary (2026-07-19)**

15 services (user-profile-service, payment-gateway, billing-worker, auth-service, ingest-api, search-indexer, export-pipeline, metrics-collector, report-builder, session-manager, cache-warmer, audit-logger, notification-daemon, webhook-relay, scheduler-core) underwent ~40+ operations across production, staging, canary, QA, blue/green, and dev environments.

Operations: health checks, scaling, draining, rolling back, patching, migrations, downgrading, redeploying, restarting, reconfiguring, upgrading. Timestamps: ~09:15, 11:05, 14:40, 16:20, plus morning/evening shifts.

Outcomes: alerts cleared, errors stabilized, manual retries required (export-pipeline QA, scheduler-core blue, ingest-api staging). No pager alerts or customer impact. Smoke tests passed. Memory/CPU normalized. Queue depths drained. Grafana confirmed expected behavior.

Status: Follow-up configuration tasks pending. Postmortems/runbooks updated.
